text:
Hello!

192.168.0.189 - $HOST

%host -6 FEC0::3:260:8FF:FE52:F9D8

/usr/src/lib/bind/isc/../../../contrib/bind9/lib/isc/unix/socket.c:1179: internal_send: ::ffff:192.168.0.1#53: Invalid argument
/usr/src/lib/bind/isc/../../../contrib/bind9/lib/isc/unix/socket.c:1179: internal_send: ::ffff:192.168.0.1#53: Invalid argument
;; connection timed out; no servers could be reached

Specify, please, it is a mistake, or and should be?

Thanks.

How-To-Repeat: host -6 FEC0::3:260:8FF:FE52:F9D8
